progress.sniffing: Capturing on {bridge} for a remote button press for up to {seconds} seconds

user.title: Add a Zemismart remote
user.description: Learn the remote automatically, or use an Advanced setup method. You will add its covers (blinds and groups) next.

learn_setup.title: Set up remote learning
learn_setup.description: Choose where this blind is located and which online RF bridge should capture the remote.

data_description.bridge: Automatic matches the selected area, then the configured default, then the first online bridge. Choose a named online bridge to override it.

learn_unavailable.title: Remote learning is unavailable
learn_unavailable.description: No online RF bridge could be discovered through MQTT. Check MQTT and bridge availability, try again, or continue with Advanced setup.

learn_timeout.title: No supported button press was detected
learn_timeout.description: Press Up, Down, or Stop on the remote during the capture window.

learn_confirm.title: Confirm the detected remote
learn_confirm.description: Detected prefix {prefix}, remote ID {remote_id}, channels {channels}, and {button} for {name} through {bridge}.

advanced.title: Advanced setup
advanced.description: Choose how to provide a calibrated remote identity.

manual.title: Enter a remote manually
manual.description: Provide the remote identity and either one labeled action base or a captured B0/B1 reference.

data_description.calibration_base: Provide this or a captured reference, not both.
data_description.calibration_frame: The captured identity must match the entered prefix and remote ID.

data_description.repeats: How many times each RF frame is sent.
data_description.coalesce_window_ms: Near-simultaneous commands for blinds on this remote merge into one group frame within this window. 0 disables coalescing.

cover.title: Add a cover
cover.description: Cover {count} so far. Name this blind or group and enter its channels.

data_description.channels: Use 1 for one blind, or a comma-separated group such as 1,2,3.
data_description.travel_up: Required for a blind; leave empty only for a group that contains covers you already added.
data_description.travel_down: Required for a blind; leave empty only for a group that contains covers you already added.

data_description.repeats: How many times each RF frame is sent.
data_description.coalesce_window_ms: Near-simultaneous commands for blinds on this remote merge into one group frame within this window. 0 disables coalescing.

error.invalid_config: Check the remote identity, calibration, channel set, travel times, area, and Advanced settings.
error.bridge_unavailable: Choose a bridge that was discovered as online.
error.already_configured: This remote is already configured by another entry.
error.travel_required: Enter both travel times — only a group containing existing covers can omit them.
error.duplicate_channels: Another cover of this remote already uses exactly these channels.
error.overlapping_channels: Channels may be fully inside, fully containing, or separate from another cover — never partially overlapping.

abort.legacy_not_supported: This entry uses the old per-blind format. Delete it and add its remote again instead of reconfiguring.
abort.channel_conflict: The collected covers conflict; start over.

data_description.channels: Use 1 for one blind, or a comma-separated group such as 1,2,3.
data_description.travel_up: Required for a blind; leave empty only for a group that contains covers you already added.
data_description.travel_down: Required for a blind; leave empty only for a group that contains covers you already added.

data_description.channels: Use 1 for one blind, or a comma-separated group such as 1,2,3.
data_description.travel_up: Required for a blind; leave empty only for a group that contains covers you already added.
data_description.travel_down: Required for a blind; leave empty only for a group that contains covers you already added.

error.invalid_config: Check the cover name, channel set, and travel times.
error.travel_required: Enter both travel times — only a group containing existing covers can omit them.
error.duplicate_channels: Another cover of this remote already uses exactly these channels.
error.overlapping_channels: Channels may be fully inside, fully containing, or separate from another cover — never partially overlapping.

abort.already_configured: Another cover of this remote already uses exactly these channels.

send_raw.name: Send raw frame
send_raw.description: Send one debug Portisch B0 frame through a specific online bridge.

bridge.name: Bridge
bridge.description: Bridge ID from the bridge's rf433 info topic.

repeats.name: Repeats
repeats.description: How many times the frame is transmitted (distant or obstructed blinds may need more).

new_virtual_remote.name: Allocate virtual remote
new_virtual_remote.description: Generate an unused remote identity with a complete synthesized calibration. The response's prefix, remote ID, and UP base go straight into the manual add-integration flow; pair the motor by sending OPEN while it is in its RF pairing mode.
